title:
TERRITORY MANAGER-SALES
Apply now »
description:
Function

India BU

Pay Band

E4 to M2

Role

As the Territory Sales Manager you will be part of the Sales - India BU and will report to the Area Sales Manager.

The purpose of your role will be to effectively achieve ABP (Despatch, retail and Market Share) through lead management, leveraging sales enablers, proper implementation of the dealer sales process, timely funds review & collection, and trained manpower availability.

A purpose driven role for you

Your key responsibilities will include, but not limited to:

1. To achieve ABP despatch, retail and MS for assigned territory

2. Strengthen prospect management at the channel

3. Sales Enablers

4. To improve customer experience

5. Growth in Hero Genuine Accessories Sale

A Day in the life

As the TM- Sales, you will be planning and driving the achievement of ABP(Despatch & Retail) and strategise on increasing the market share by leveraging the sales enablers.

You will have an exciting opportunity to explore different avenues to strengthen the prospect management at the channel to drive new vehicles sales

Academic Qualification & Experience

- MBA

- 1-3 yrs of Experience

Technical Skills/Knowledge

- Knowledge of Product & Variants

- Sales Planning and Execution

- Channel Management

- Financial Management

- Technical/Commercial skills (DMS & SAP)

Behavioural Skills

- Building Relationships

- Drive for Results

- Effective Time Management

- Business Communication

- Effective Decision making

What will it be like to work for Hero

As the world’s largest manufacturer of motorcycles and scooters for the last 22 years, Hero is where you will get to work with the brightest innovators, passionate about being the best in what they do. You will become a part of India’s proudest legacy, a brand that is celebrated by 110 million Indians and is now taking over the world with its manufacturing superpower. If you are someone who dreams big and goes after their dreams with absolute conviction, Hero is your place to be. At Hero, we are building a cutting-edge future of mobility, pushing frontiers of innovation and aiming for the very best. Choose to be with the best, choose to be your best

About Hero

Headquartered in New Delhi (India), Hero MotoCorp is the world's largest manufacturer of motorcycles and scooters for 22 consecutive years. We are at the forefront of developing modern, technologically superior and eco-friendly mobility solutions for its millions of customers around the world.

Hero MotoCorp has rapidly transformed into a true multinational organization with a presence in 47 countries across Asia, Africa, Latin America and the Middle East.

We have achieved the coveted milestone of 110 million cumulative production and sales since inception. Aligned with its Vision “Be the Future of Mobility”, Hero MotoCorp plans to achieve its next 100 million sales by 2030.

We have a globally benchmarked manufacturing and Research & Development (R&D) ecosystem that is spread across global geographies. Its R&D facilities are located in India and Germany - the Centre of Innovation and Technology (CIT) at Jaipur, India, and the Tech Centre Germany (TCG), near Munich. Hero MotoCorp’s eight ‘green’ manufacturing facilities are spread across India (6), Colombia (1) and Bangladesh (1).

Hero MotoCorp is the pre-eminent leader in the Indian two-wheeler market. It is the only motorcycle manufacturing company listed in Dow Jones Sustainability Index.

In 2022, Hero MotoCorp launched a separate brand for emerging mobility solutions, including Electric Vehicles (EV) - VIDA, Powered by Hero. VIDA has commenced sales of VIDA V1 – its first EV – in India and plans to launch the product in global markets.

We are one of the largest global corporate promoters of multiple sporting disciplines. Hero is globally associated with golf, football, field hockey, cricket and motorsports. Hero MotoSports Team Rally is one of India’s flag-bearers in global rally racing. The iconic golfer Tiger Woods is Hero MotoCorp’s Global Corporate Partner.

Read more about us.

Be with the best. Be your best. Catch-up on all our latest openings.

title:
Technical Support- Chassis Design (Structure)
Apply now »
description:
Function

Research & Development - Jaipur

Pay Band

E3 & below

Role

Techincal Support- Chassis Design (Structure)

A purpose driven role for you

The Technical Support is responsible for carrying out benchmarking activities of competing brands and suggests VA/VE ideas. The role involves making and releasing drawings & 3-D models on CATIA and Team Centre.

A Day in the life

• Chassis systems layout & design of all parts and layout finalization.
CAD modelling (3 D modelling and 2 D drawing) for frames and structure components. (Sheet Metal, casting and forging as well).

• Preparing design manuals
Part & system level benchmarking & detail benchmark database generation.
Prepare document for design release


Academic Qualification & Experience

Diploma in Mechanical/Automobile Engineering

Technical Skills/Knowledge

• Good understanding of DFMEA and GD&T.
• Knowledge of required manufacturing process in frame design.
• Knowledge of manufacturing and assembly process
• Vehicle level knowledge of adjoining systems & its impact on performance of vehicle.

Drive for results- Willing to strive to deliver tasks on time with quality

title:
Technical Support- Release Management
Apply now »
description:
Function

Research & Development - Jaipur

Pay Band

E4 to M2

Role

Technical Support- Release Management

A purpose driven role for you

• Responsible for vehicle BOM (bill of material) and drawing control in PLM System.
• Responsible for support as CFT member for SAP Material-BOM management
• Responsible for PLM Training, BOM Training, Drawing Making Training, etc.
• Responsible for identifying, highlighting, and supporting resolution of BoM related issues across the organization.
• Responsible for representing Release Management Team in Program Meetings to report planned vs actual release status, by program.
• Interface between R&D and Plant to support issue resolution.

A Day in the life

1. To control the BOM system for all New projects / Mass Production models
2. PLM Teamcentre Knowledge is must.
3. PLM & schedule manager support for new objects / business process / workflow / forms & dataset etc.
4. ECN Change Management Review.
5. Knowledge of Control / Storage of Drgs. And Specs. / Test Specs / standards
6. Triggering new ideas of improvement for Release Management Team.
7. Responsible that the prevailing processes and procedures within his department will be complied.

Academic Qualification & Experience

Diploma in Engineering

Technical Skills/Knowledge

• Analytical and problem solving skill
• Deep Knowledge of Part Numbering System / BOM & Variant Management
• Knowledge of PLM

Behavioural Skills

• Strong sense of achievement and ownership
• Good communication skills (written and verbal)

title:
EXECUTIVE
Apply now »
description:
Function

Finance

Pay Band

M2

Role

Business Partnering (Corporate Functions)

Strategic Support: Act as a strategic partner to Corporate Functions to align on financial document requirements and control frameworks.

Investment & Sensitivity Analysis: Partner with Project Engineering and corporate teams to analyze strategic investment decisions and conduct sensitivity analysis for various proposals.

Project Evaluation: Collaborate with cross-functional teams on improvement projects, providing financial validation and tracking performance standards.

Education & Governance: Educate user departments on finance document requirements and internal control protocols to maintain financial integrity.

Budgeting & Business Planning

Forecast Preparation: Lead the preparation and presentation of annual forecasted financials while collaborating across functions.

Plan Monitoring: Periodically monitor and report on organizational adherence to established business plans.

Accounting

Ledger Governance: Maintain the "sanity and hygiene" of financial books, ensuring all accounting entries align with established policies

Review of Trade payables, ageing, compliance with GST and TDS requirements, including periodic reporting

Variance Justification: Evaluate and justify variances between budgeted and actual financial performance for senior management reporting.

Audit Management: Coordinate with internal and external auditors to ensure report closure within agreed timeframes and implement dynamic controls.

Compliance: Ensure zero tolerance for deviations from legal and regulatory compliance, including tax filings and assessment notices.

 

Management Reporting & Digitization

MIS Preparation: Prepare detailed MIS for effective decision-making.

A purpose driven role for you

Responsible for assisting functions in developing performance metrics to drive business planning and decision support. Additionally, drafting monthly MIS and providing insights on business performance for circulation to the leadership team.

A Day in the life

A day in life will be around, responsible for assisting functions in developing performance metrics to drive business planning and decision support. Additionally, drafting monthly MIS and providing insights on business performance for circulation to the leadership team. 

Academic Qualification & Experience

Chartered Accountant (CA) 
with 6–9 Years’ Experience 

(Preferably from manufacturing industry)

 

Technical Skills/Knowledge

Financial modelling, sensitivity analysis, in-depth knowledge of accounting policies, SAP, and MS Office.

Behavioural Skills

Time management

Customer Focus

Relationship Building

Problem Solving

Conflict Management

What will it be like to work for Hero

title:
Lead Legal - Direct Business
Apply now »
description:
Function

Legal

Pay Band

M3 to M5

Role

This role is responsible for drafting , negotiating all direct business contracts of the Company such as contracts with suppliers, developers, transportation/logistic service providers, manpower supply agreements, service agreements etc,.

A purpose driven role for you

On the operational side:
(i) Draft, review and negotiate a variety of commercial contracts and transactions executed by the company in relation to its direct business;
(ii) Mitigate any company risks that may come up from any contractual commitments;
(iii) Manage contractual timelines and discussion regarding renewals, amendments and change orders;
(iv) Monitor changes to regulatory requirements and advice compliance
proactively handling regulatory developments;
(v) Serve as a lead counsel on all strategic deals resolving issues that arise in commercial contracts;
(vi) Review business providing legal insights and expertise on the existing and new business propositions;
(vii) Ability to evaluate business cases, identify legal risks and effectively communicate risks to internal stakeholders.
(viii) Providing guidance, advice and/or training to improve business’ understating of applicable laws.
(ix) Well versed with Agreements like, Master Service Agreement, Supply Agreement, Non discloser Agreement, Information technology related Agreements etc.

A Day in the life

Understanding the business and operations of an OEM and ensure the organisation’s interest are protected
Aligning multiple internal and external stakeholders and closing commercial agreements.
Negotiating and closing high stake and critical contracts in limited time

Academic Qualification & Experience

Law graduate. 10-14 Years (varying based on the experience in
the relevant sector). Prior experience of working in a manufacturing industry is a must. Prior experience with an OEM will be an added advantage.

Technical Skills/Knowledge

Breadth of legal expertise – Understating of wide variety of laws.
Ability to identify legal risks and develop effective legal strategies and practical solutions.

Behavioural Skills

Proactive and self-motivated with a keen eye for detail
Drive for result
Solution focus
Quick decision making
Relationship Management
Analytical and logical reasoning

Function

Legal

Pay Band

M3 to M5

Role

This role is responsible for drafting , negotiating all direct business contracts of the Company such as contracts with suppliers, developers, transportation/logistic service providers, manpower supply agreements, service agreements etc,.

(i) Draft, review and negotiate a variety of commercial contracts and transactions executed by the company in relation to its direct business;

Law graduate. 10-14 Years (varying based on the experience in

Breadth of legal expertise – Understating of wide variety of laws.

title:
Program Manager- Digital
Apply now »
description:
Function

Procurement

Pay Band

E4 to M2

Role

Program Manager- Digital

A purpose driven role for you

Your responsibilities will include but not limited to:
1. Strategic CSR Sourcing: Execute end-to-end strategic sourcing and delivery of specialized CSR project requirements while maintaining ethical and sustainability standards.
2. Digital Transformation: Lead the rollout of digital procurement platforms like SAP Ariba and Icertis, driving efficiency through AI-powered automation.
3. Value Optimization: Identify and execute cost-saving and value-engineering initiatives without compromising quality or project timelines.


A Day in the life

You will be working on day-to-day basis on following:
1. S2P Management: Managing the full Source-to-Pay lifecycle, including vendor evaluation for CSR and evaluation of proposals based on pricing and support.
2. PR-PO Conversion: Reviewing purchase requisitions daily to ensure 100% TAT assurance and compliance adherence.
3. Digital Innovation: Identifying and piloting new AI-driven automation ideas to solve procurement bottlenecks and reporting on digital transition workflows.
4. Contract Negotiation: Negotiating licensing agreements and contract terms with vendors in coordination with the Legal team.
5 .Market Intelligence: Conducting research to identify and vet high-alignment partners for specialized CSR needs.
6. Supplier Performance: Monitoring supplier performance and settling annual rate contracts (ARC) for spot buying with global suppliers.
7. Stakeholder Coordination: Collaborating with CSR and Finance teams for procurement clarifications, invoicing, and payment support.


Academic Qualification & Experience

1.Education: B.Tech in IT/CS/Mechanical/Electronics or PGDIM in Supply Chain/Operations.
2.Experience: 5-8 years in Procurement and Digital project management (for B.Tech holders).


Technical Skills/Knowledge

1.Digital Platforms: Proficiency in ERP, CLM tools, and SAP MM Module transactions.
2.S2P/P2P Lifecycle: Expert understanding of end-to-end strategic sourcing and full Procurement-to-Pay lifecycles.
3.Market Analysis: Ability to conduct comprehensive market research and partner vetting.
4.Office Productivity: Advanced skills in MS Excel and MS Office for spend analysis and weekly saving data maintenance.
5.Project Management: Proven experience in managing digital implementation projects and innovation pipelines.


Behavioural Skills

1.Strategic Orientation: Ability to align procurement strategies with long-term organizational CSR objectives.
2.Innovative Thinking: Driving the adoption of new digital tools and solving complex automation challenges.
3.Communication Skills: Effective verbal and written communication for cross-functional synergy and vendor negotiations.
4.Solution Focused: Proactively addressing bottlenecks in a dynamic, challenging environment.
5.Continuous Improvement: Commitment to capability building through workshops and deepening expertise in the procurement domain.

title:
Team Member - EXIM
Apply now »
description:
Function

Procurement

Pay Band

E4 to M2

Role

Team Member - EXIM

A purpose driven role for you

Your responsibilities will include but not limited to:
1.Shipment Management: Manage timely dispatch and custom clearance for all import and export shipments.
2.Regulatory Compliance: Ensure 100% adherence to Indian Custom Rules, Regulations, and RBI laws.
3.Incentive Optimization: Avail 100% of available EXIM benefits and incentives on time.


A Day in the life

You will be working on day-to-day basis on following:
1.Freight Negotiation: Negotiating with forwarders to achieve the best landed cost for air and sea shipments.
2.Custom Clearance: Ensuring import clearance occurs within 3 days of shipment arrival.
3.Contract Management: Preparing monthly, quarterly, and yearly contracts for CHAs and shipping lines.
4.Payment Processing: Processing L/C, advance, and direct payments to overseas suppliers in compliance with laws.
5.Lead Time Monitoring: Tracking end-to-end logistics transit times on a daily basis.
6.Cross-functional Education: Advising internal departments and suppliers on Inco Terms and documentation.
7.Cost Improvement: Driving initiatives to reduce existing EXIM costs by 10%.


Academic Qualification & Experience

1.Education: MBA/PG in International Business or B.Sc/B.Com/Engineering with a Diploma in Foreign Trade.
2.Experience: 5–10 years in EXIM, preferably in Automotive or Household appliances.


Technical Skills/Knowledge

1.Custom Laws: Expert knowledge of Indian custom laws and trade policies of dealing countries. 
2.Logistics Documentation: Proficiency in banking documentation, Inco Terms, and RBI compliance.
3.Freight Forwarding: Deep understanding of air and sea freight market dynamics and volatile shipping trends.
4.Financial Management: Ability to manage activities within a large budget (e.g., 182 Cr) and avoid demurrage.
5.Multi-location Logistics: Managing complex logistics across 11+ global and domestic sites.
 

Behavioural Skills

1.Communication: Effectively educating stakeholders on complex import/export procedures.
2.Negotiation: Securing competitive rates in a volatile shipping industry.
3.Team Player: Working collaboratively with Finance, R&D, and Production teams.
4.Analytical Skills: Publishing detailed monthly EXIM MIS and cost improvement reports.
5.Adaptability: Managing logistics complexities during uncertain periods like pandemics.

Apply now »
description:
Function

Operations

Pay Band

E4 to M2

Role

As the Team Manager you will be part of the Safety & Enviroment and will report to the Section Head - Safety & Environment.
The purpose of your role will be to handle Safety, Health & Enviroment in the plant.

A purpose driven role for you

Your key responsibilities will include, but not limited to:
1. Measures for prevention of accidents.
2. Organise legal compliance activities as per calendar.
3. Supervision of safety & Fire Protection facilities.
4. Organising trainings & awareness to reduce the injuries & incidents.
5. Environmental Protection activities.
6. To achieve IMS and EnMS objectives through adherence of systems and procedures for resource conservation in Section.

To plan, coordinate and execute the activities in the area of Safety, Health and Enviroment, in order to avoid any RLTI or LTI and keep the operations run smoothly to achieve the daily business targets.

2. Diploma in Engineering/Degree in Science with 10 to 12 years of work experience in safety & environment

Technical Skills/Knowledge

1. MS Office, SAP & PPT
2. 5S, TPM, SPC & TPS
3. Understanding of benchmarking process
4. Formulation of action plan for mitigating risk related to IMS & EnMS
5. Energy Baseline
6. Variables affecting energy performance
7. Preparing Audit Plan
8. Knowledge of Safety & Environment activities

title:
Technical Support - Metrology
Apply now »
description:
Function

Research & Development - Jaipur

Pay Band

E3 & Below

Role

Technical Support - Metrology

A purpose driven role for you

This role requires a Metrology or Quality Engineer to perform high-precision 2D and 3D inspections of automotive components using scanning technology (GOM/ Polyworks) and CMM equipment. You will be responsible for validating prototype parts against engineering drawings, ensuring strict GD&T compliance.

A Day in the life

Execute 3D scanning and 2D inspections on plastic and engine parts to validate dimensional accuracy.
Analyse scan data via Polyworks and GOM software to identify deviations from CAD models.
Validate prototype components (New Models) to ensure design intent is met within project timelines.
Interpret GD&T parameters on engineering drawings to ensure parts meet functional assembly requirements.

Academic Qualification & Experience

Diploma (Mechanical Engineering)

Technical Skills/Knowledge

Technical / Functional Competencies:
• Metrology Software Proficiency: Expert-level command over Polyworks and GOM Inspect for aligning scan data, creating colour maps, and performing 2D/3D comparisons.
• Advanced 3D Scanning: Hands-on expertise in operating Blue and White light scanners, including surface preparation, exposure setting, and point cloud optimization
• Precision Equipment Operation: Skilled in operating Fixed/Portable CMMs, Gear testers, Form measurement machines, and Surface Roughness testers.
• GD&T Interpretation: Advanced ability to read and apply Geometric Dimensioning and Tolerancing (ASME Y14.5) to physical parts, ensuring functional assembly.


Behavioural Skills

• Attention to Detail: Meticulous approach to identifying "micron-level" deviations that could impact long-term part performance.
• Analytical Thinking: Ability to diagnose why a part is "out of spec" rather than just reporting the error.

title:
Senior Digital Sculptor
Apply now »
description:
Function

Research & Development - Jaipur

Pay Band

E4 to M2

Role

Senior Digital Sculptor - IDS

A purpose driven role for you

Responsible to execute surface modelling for assigned Cycle Plan Projects as per decided deadlines for the Planned Projects.
Anticipate and understand requirements of the project and timely deliverable as per plan,
Candidate should have skill in concept (Alias SUB-D) and Class A surfacing using Alias Surface and other suitable software.
Work directly/interact with the Designer, Clay Modeller and Engineering teams to develop 3d model to meet design requirements.

A Day in the life

Generating CLASS-A,3D CAD DATA and CAS Data from various input forms - Sketch, Scan, Engineering CAD/Section, Designer Verbal input, Tape draw.
Meet time line and Quality standard target precisely.
Ability to work with in team.
Identify, analyse and solve potential feasibility issue with creative solution
Visualisation for Design Review, Documentation

Academic Qualification & Experience

B.E/B.Des

6+ years of Work experience preferably in Automotive R&D Or Automotive, CAS consultancy

Technical Skills/Knowledge

1. Would be able to manage complete projects, including planning, reviewing, data preparation,
and releases, with minimal guidance.
2. Ability to generate 3D shape using the Alias software.
3. Sub D modelling using either Alias or Blender or any Poly Modelling Medium.
4. Ability to generate class-A surface of high quality.
5. Work with the Engineer and Designer and provide optimize solution to keep the design intent.
6. Proficiency in VRED software is highly advantageous.
7. Basic Knowledge of PLM
8. Proficient at Microsoft office –word, excel, PowerPoint etc.


Behavioural Skills

Strong team building capability
Willingness to share experience
Keen on new ideas and technologies
Dynamic and proactive work approach

About Hero

Headquartered in New Delhi (India), Hero MotoCorp is the world's largest manufacturer of motorcycles and scooters for 22 consecutive years. We are at the forefront of developing modern, technologically superior and eco-friendly mobility solutions for its millions of customers around the world.

Hero MotoCorp has rapidly transformed into a true multinational organization with a presence in 47 countries across Asia, Africa, Latin America and the Middle East.

We have achieved the coveted milestone of 110 million cumulative production and sales since inception. Aligned with its Vision “Be the Future of Mobility”, Hero MotoCorp plans to achieve its next 100 million sales by 2030.

We have a globally benchmarked manufacturing and Research & Development (R&D) ecosystem that is spread across global geographies. Its R&D facilities are located in India and Germany - the Centre of Innovation and Technology (CIT) at Jaipur, India, and the Tech Centre Germany (TCG), near Munich. Hero MotoCorp’s eight ‘green’ manufacturing facilities are spread across India (6), Colombia (1) and Bangladesh (1).

Hero MotoCorp is the pre-eminent leader in the Indian two-wheeler market. It is the only motorcycle manufacturing company listed in Dow Jones Sustainability Index.

In 2022, Hero MotoCorp launched a separate brand for emerging mobility solutions, including Electric Vehicles (EV) - VIDA, Powered by Hero. VIDA has commenced sales of VIDA V1 – its first EV – in India and plans to launch the product in global markets.

We are one of the largest global corporate promoters of multiple sporting disciplines. Hero is globally associated with golf, football, field hockey, cricket and motorsports. Hero MotoSports Team Rally is one of India’s flag-bearers in global rally racing. The iconic golfer Tiger Woods is Hero MotoCorp’s Global Corporate Partner.
